comment.body:
Every company is claiming some AI angle. DDOG is also doing the same and positioning themselves as AI observability in addition to Data observability. They are also claiming AI secops as securing AI workloads. Insert any company's pitch and you will see AI in there and crowd is lapping it up. 

As Alma's note from the morning says...rigged market :)

comment.body:
Thanks for sharing the GS CTA note. Looks like in almost all scenarios CTAs are buyers. This in addition to record call buying from retail. 

That tiny window of weakness for next week became nano window now :) and post that buybacks will also resume so BTD regime remains strongly in effect.
